title: Add to existing automation and adjust steps
excerpt:
I would like to be able to add to an existing automation and have the ability to possibly drag and drop multiple automations within one automation in a specific order without having to create a whole new automation.

posts.author: corjlsoftware (Corjl)
posts.cookedHtml:
I would like to be able to add to an existing automation and have the ability to possibly drag and drop multiple automations within one automation in a specific order without having to create a whole new automation.

Example: One automation that contains 'When (status) changes to (Pre Arrival)" → “Then create a (subitem)” x4. So if I wanted to have an additional subitem added to the existing automation, I would be able to. As well as change the order of the subitems so that when the subitem is created after the status changes to Pre Arrival, it will also appear in that order.

posts.author: kolaai (alfred)
posts.cookedHtml: Currently, it is not possible to edit an automation. The workaround is to duplicate the automation, which will allow you to edit it, and then delete the previously created one.
